    Constructor

    HistoryRowData(String songTitle, String artistName, String playedAt, int durationSeconds, Song song)
    Data transfer object representing a single row in the listening history analytics view.
     
    StatCardsData(String playbackDurationValue, String playbackDurationUnit, String averageSessionValue, String averageSessionUnit, String todayTopSongName, String todayTopAlbumName, String weeklyTopSongName, String weeklyTopAlbumName, Song todayTopSong, Album todayTopAlbum, Song weeklyTopSong, Album weeklyTopAlbum)
    Data transfer object carrying all formatted display strings and entity references needed to populate the five dashboard stat cards.

  • Uses of Song in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews

    Subclasses with type arguments of type Song in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AlbumSongCell
    A ListCell used inside the album detail view to display a single Song as a tabular row containing the track number, title, play count, date first listened, and a context-menu trigger button.
    class 
    SongCell
    A ListCell that renders a Song as a horizontal row containing an optional 40px album-art thumbnail, the song title, the primary artist name, and an optional context-menu trigger button.
    Methods in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews that return types with arguments of type Song
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    LibraryHandler.onSongMenu()
    Returns the value of the onSongMenu record component.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    SongEditDialog.show(Song song, Runnable onSaved)
    Opens the edit dialog for the given song and saves changes on confirmation.
    void

    Displays the song context menu anchored below the given node.
    Method parameters in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews with type arguments of type Song
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    javafx.scene.layout.TilePane
    SongViewBuilder.buildGridView(List<Song> songs)
    Builds a song card grid using SortStrategy.ALPHABETICAL.
    javafx.scene.layout.TilePane
    SongViewBuilder.buildGridView(List<Song> songs, SortStrategy sort)
    Builds a TilePane card grid of songs sorted by the given strategy.
    javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane
    SongViewBuilder.buildListView(List<Song> songs)
    Builds a grouped, scrollable song list using SortStrategy.ALPHABETICAL.
    javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane
    SongViewBuilder.buildListView(List<Song> songs, SortStrategy sort)
    Builds a scrollable list of songs grouped under A–Z section dividers, with a vertical AlphabetBar on the right that jumps to each section.
